fields.Name: DocuSign JWT
fields.Description: DocuSign JWT-grant (service integration) credentials for the eSignature primitive. Holds the integration key, API user/account IDs, and the RSA private key used to sign the JWT assertion (scope: signature impersonation).

fields.Name: API Key
fields.Description: Simple API key authentication. Used by most AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, Google Gemini), email services (SendGrid), and many other APIs.

fields.Name: API Key with Endpoint
fields.Description: API key with a custom endpoint URL. Used for Azure OpenAI and other services that require both a key and endpoint.

fields.Name: OAuth2 Client Credentials
fields.Description: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Used for server-to-server authentication where no user interaction is needed.

fields.Name: Basic Auth
fields.Description: Username and password authentication. Used for basic HTTP authentication and simple login-based systems.

fields.Name: Azure Service Principal
fields.Description: Azure AD service principal credentials. Used for Microsoft Graph, Azure OpenAI, Azure Blob Storage, and other Azure services.

fields.Name: AWS IAM
fields.Description: AWS IAM credentials. Used for S3, SES, Lambda, and other AWS services.

fields.Name: Database Connection
fields.Description: Database connection credentials. Used for SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and other databases.

fields.Name: Twilio
fields.Description: Twilio account credentials for SMS, voice, and messaging services. Uses Account SID + Auth Token pattern.

fields.Name: Google Cloud Platform
fields.Description: Google Cloud Platform service account credentials. Used for Vertex AI, Google Cloud Storage, and other GCP services. Supports three authentication methods: Application Default Credentials (ADC), full service account JSON, or key file path.

fields.Name: Box.com OAuth
fields.Description: Box.com OAuth2 credentials for file storage integration. Supports OAuth2 refresh token flow (recommended), client credentials grant for enterprise/service accounts, and direct access tokens. Box issues new refresh tokens on each token refresh.

fields.Name: MCP OAuth Token
fields.Description: OAuth2 tokens for MCP server connections. Stores access and refresh tokens issued during the OAuth authorization flow. Tokens are managed automatically by the MCP OAuth system.

fields.Name: YourMembership API
fields.Description: YourMembership AMS session-based authentication. Requires a Client ID, API Key (license key), and API Password. The connector authenticates via POST to /Ams/Authenticate to obtain a session token.

fields.Name: rasa.io API
fields.Description: rasa.io newsletter platform authentication. Requires a username (email), password, and API key. The connector authenticates via POST to /v1/tokens with Basic auth to obtain a JWT token used on all subsequent requests.

fields.Name: Wicket API
fields.Description: Wicket membership platform JWT authentication. Requires an API Secret (HMAC key), Admin User UUID, and either a direct API URL or Tenant Name to derive the endpoint.

fields.Name: Salesforce JWT Bearer
fields.Description: Salesforce OAuth 2.0 JWT Bearer Token flow for server-to-server integration. Requires a Connected App with a digital certificate (RS256). The private key stays on the MJ server; the public X.509 certificate is uploaded to Salesforce.

fields.Name: Sage Intacct
fields.Description: Sage Intacct Web Services API credentials. Two-layer auth: Sender ID/Password (app-level) plus Company ID, User ID, and User Password (session-level). Used by the SageIntacctConnector.

fields.Name: QuickBooks Online OAuth
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online OAuth 2.0 credentials for REST API v3. Requires Client ID/Secret, Realm ID, and OAuth tokens. The connector automatically refreshes expired access tokens.

fields.Name: Aptify Authentication
fields.Description: Aptify (Community Brands / Momentive Software) Web Services token-based auth. Connector POSTs to /authentication with Username + Password (and optional AuthProvider, defaults to AptifyUser) to obtain a TokenId, then sends Authorization: Web {TokenId} on subsequent requests.

fields.Name: Blackbaud SKY API
fields.Description: Blackbaud SKY API OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow + Bb-Api-Subscription-Key header. Connector refreshes the access token automatically via the refresh token; rotated refresh tokens are persisted back to the credential.

fields.Name: Constant Contact OAuth
fields.Description: Constant Contact OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. Refresh tokens rotate on every refresh — connector persists the new refresh token back to the credential row to avoid disconnects.

fields.Name: GrowthZone API
fields.Description: GrowthZone AMS API key authentication. Connector sends Authorization: ApiKey {key} (non-standard wire form, not Bearer). BaseURL is derived from Tenant subdomain (myassociation.growthzoneapp.com/api) unless overridden.

fields.Name: iMIS OAuth
fields.Description: iMIS RiSE OAuth 2.0 Password Grant. Default flow uses Username + Password against /token with the RemoteService role required. Optionally supports SSO refresh-token flow when ClientId/ClientSecret are provided.

fields.Name: MagnetMail API
fields.Description: MagnetMail/Higher Logic Marketing SOAP API authentication. Connector POSTs to mmapi.asmx with UserId + Password embedded in the SOAP envelope. Endpoint defaults to https://hlma-apie1.magnetmail.net/mmapi.asmx.

fields.Name: NetSuite TBA
fields.Description: NetSuite Token-Based Authentication (OAuth 1.0a) for the REST Record API + SuiteQL. Requires AccountID + Consumer Key/Secret (integration record) + Token ID/Secret (access token tied to a specific integration user).

fields.Name: Nimble AMS OAuth
fields.Description: Nimble AMS (Salesforce-native AMS) OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow. Requires the customer's Salesforce InstanceURL plus a Connected App Client ID + Client Secret. The Nimble AMS connector calls /services/oauth2/token to obtain a Bearer access token, then uses the Salesforce REST API at /services/data/v59.0/sobjects/ for CRUD on NU__-namespaced objects.

fields.Name: NetForum Enterprise Token
fields.Description: NetForum Enterprise (Community Brands / Abila) two-step token authentication. The connector POSTs to BaseURL/xWeb/JSON/Authenticate with HTTP Basic auth (Username + Password) and receives a Bearer token used on subsequent xWeb JSON calls. BaseURL is per-tenant — required for any operation.
